title: MLOps fundamentals
text: MLOps combines machine learning with software engineering. Key practices include experiment tracking with MLflow, automated testing, CI/CD pipelines, and model monitoring in production.

title: Ray for distributed ML
text: Ray Train scales PyTorch and TensorFlow across multiple GPUs. Ray Tune runs hyperparameter search in parallel. Ray Serve deploys models as HTTP APIs with autoscaling.

title: Data validation
text: Great Expectations lets teams define data contracts. Validate schema types null rates and value distributions before data reaches training pipelines.

title: RAG architecture
text: Retrieval-augmented generation embeds documents into a vector store retrieves relevant chunks at query time and passes them as context to an LLM for grounded answers.

title: LLM evaluation
text: Evaluate LLM apps with faithfulness relevancy and safety metrics. Tools like Ragas and promptfoo support regression testing when prompts or models change.

title: Kubernetes for ML
text: KubeRay manages Ray clusters on Kubernetes. Use Docker images for reproducible environments and horizontal scaling for training and serving workloads.
